use serde_json::Value;

// BAD: deserializing to serde_json::Value in hot path
fn process_event(json_str: &str) -> Result<Event, Error> {
    let value: Value = serde_json::from_str(json_str)?;

    let event_type = value["type"].as_str().unwrap_or("unknown");
    let timestamp = value["timestamp"].as_u64().unwrap_or(0);
    let payload = value["payload"].clone();

    Ok(Event {
        event_type: event_type.to_string(),
        timestamp,
        payload,
    })
}

fn handle_stream(messages: &[String]) -> Vec<Event> {
    messages.iter()
        .filter_map(|msg| process_event(msg).ok())
        .collect()
}
